description:
Stream your Windows PC to any device with native, GPU-accelerated remote desktop.

Remio Host turns your Windows PC into a streaming target that any Remio client (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Android, Windows) can connect to over the local network or the internet.

Built from scratch with native WinUI 3 — no Electron, no browser wrappers. Full GPU-accelerated H.264/H.265 screen capture, loopback audio, multi-monitor support, drag-and-drop file transfer, clipboard sync, and gamepad passthrough. Runs as a Windows Service so it survives reboots and log-offs.

Includes built-in auto-updates via WinSparkle (EdDSA-signed end-to-end), so you always have the latest version with one click.
Remio Host 2.2.2 — no more black screens after reconnecting, and
streaming on PCs that could never stream before.

- Fixed a black screen that lasted the whole session — connecting,
  disconnecting, and connecting again could leave you staring at black
  until you restarted the Host. Reconnecting now brings the screen up
  every time.
- Fixed picture quality quietly degrading after a few reconnects — some
  PCs gave up on the graphics card and switched to slower software video
  for days. Remio now keeps using your graphics card.
- Privacy Mode no longer hides the screen from you too — only the screen
  at your desk goes dark, and turning it off reliably restores it.
- Fixed unexpected quits while pairing and reconnecting.
- New: streams on older Windows 10 PCs and in remote-desktop and server
  setups where Remio previously started but could never send a picture.
